subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath kindled the lamp of recognition in the realm of existence and illumined the horizon of the world with the lights of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اوقد مصباح العرفان فی الامکان و انار افق العالم بانوار الحکمه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
